---
name: Anachronism report
about: A scene the prompt didn't catch as historically wrong.
title: "[ANACHRONISM] Era: <era> — Object/Term: <what>"
labels: anachronism, accuracy
assignees: ''
---

## What the prompt produced

Paste the scene's image-prompt or VO line.

## What's anachronistic

Specify object / term / costume / architecture / language and the actual earliest correct year.

## Source for correct period

Cite Britannica / Encyclopaedia Iranica / JSTOR / monograph.

## Suggested addition to anachronism kill list

```
| <Anachronism> | <Earliest correct year> | <Common error> |
```

## Locale (if relevant)

English / Hindi / other.
